name: Stanley Nelson Jr.
description: American film director and film producer
abstract: Stanley Earl Nelson Jr. (born June 7, 1951) is an American documentary filmmaker and a MacArthur Fellow known as a director, writer and producer of documentaries examining African-American history and experiences.

about_quotes.speaker: Carol Bash
about_quotes.evidence: I was lucky enough to be working with a veteran filmmaker, Stanley Nelson. And he really has been my mentor throughout this process.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carol Bash interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 2, 2012
